heading: Additional Resources
body:
To learn more about using Mastra with MongoDB, see:

- [Mastra MongoDB Vector Store Reference](https://mastra.ai/en/reference/vectors/mongodb)

- [Mastra Vector Databases Documentation](https://mastra.ai/en/docs/rag/vector-databases)

- [Mastra Memory with MongoDB](https://mastra.ai/en/examples/memory/memory-with-mongodb).

- [Mastra RAG Documentation](https://mastra.ai/en/docs/rag/overview)

- [Mastra GitHub Repository](https://github.com/mastra-ai/mastra)
